tasks.description: Summarize portfolio strengths/weaknesses and identify tickers to keep, adjust, or replace.

subtasks.description: Synthesize analysis data to make decisions: which tickers to retain, increase, reduce, or drop.

tasks.description: Screen for higher quality, less correlated replacement assets (stocks and ETFs).

subtasks.description: Call stock_screener at least 3 times with strict 3-4 constraint queries based on current weaknesses and desired optimization profile.
Screen for suitable ETFs for diversification using stock_screener with ETF constraints.

tasks.description: Construct the new/optimized portfolio and log the proposed structure.

subtasks.description: Define new portfolio composition with allocations and positions based on analysis and screeners.
Call episodic_remember to log new optimized portfolio structure.

tasks.description: Run analytics on the new portfolio to validate optimization and further refine.

subtasks.description: Call calculate_portfolio_performance and calculate_portfolio_returns_metrics to assess performance/returns.
Call calculate_portfolio_correlation_matrix and calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index to confirm lower correlation and beta.
Iteratively adjust allocations and re-analyze until criteria are met and portfolio is optimized.

tasks.description: Output the final optimized portfolio and summary of changes in strict JSON format.

subtasks.description: Summarize the portfolio changes, including added/removed/adjusted assets as per output requirements.
Output the new portfolio and changes in required JSON format.

tasks.description: Format and finalize the entire plan as a well-structured TodoList for execution.

subtasks.description: Ensure all sections conform to format/structure requirements and all tool dependencies are specified.
